top_niches.notes_summary: 18.5M fitness community — LARGEST addressable market scanned to date. MyFitnessPal 1.9M ratings proves the fitness app market is massive and paying. Yet ALL top fitness apps are TRACKERS or WORKOUT DE

8.2M nutrition community. Zero (fasting app) has 310K ratings — people pay for nutrition behavior apps. Cronometer has 89K ratings for micronutrient tracking. Yet NO app teaches nutrition biochemistry
